allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['path']\) for f in data.get\('files',[]\) if 'dist' in f['path'] and f['path'].endswith\('.js'\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d['version']\); print\(d.get\('main','no main'\)\); print\(list\(d.get\('exports',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:5]\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(p.version, p.main, JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(p.exports||{}\).slice\(0,5\)\)\);}\)")
